title: Buying Clothes 买衣服
scene: 妈妈带女儿去商店买衣服。

lines.en: Excuse me, we are looking for a dress for my daughter.
lines.zh: 打扰一下，我想给我女儿买一条裙子。

lines.en: Sure! How old is your daughter?
She's ten years old. She likes pink and purple.
lines.zh: 她十岁了。她喜欢粉色和紫色。

lines.en: We have some beautiful dresses over here.
lines.zh: 我们这边有一些漂亮的裙子。

lines.en: Mom, I like this pink one! Can I try it on?
lines.zh: 妈妈，我喜欢这条粉色的！我能试穿吗？

lines.en: Of course! The fitting room is right over there.
lines.zh: 当然可以！试衣间就在那边。

lines.en: Mom, it fits perfectly! How much is it?
It's on sale today. Only eighty-nine yuan.
lines.zh: 今天打折。只要八十九元。

lines.en: That's a good price. We'll take it. Can I pay by phone?
lines.zh: 价格不错。我们买了。可以手机支付吗？

lines.en: Yes, you can scan this QR code. Thank you for shopping!
lines.zh: 可以，您扫这个二维码。感谢购物！
